name: Voracious Huntress
Description: Amy lurks in the darkest depths of the caverns near the entrance to the labyrinth...

theScene: You appear by the entrance to the labyrinth, and make your way back towards the caverns, and it doesn't take long for Amy to prowl out of the darkness with a curious purr, tilting her head with a chirp as she stares at you.
She doesn't seem hostile to you... Maybe because you got to the checkpoint?

You appear by the entrance to the labyrinth, and make your way back towards the caverns, and it doesn't take long for Amy to prowl out of the darkness, and as she gazes at you she bristles with aggression, letting out a hiss of agitation. Taking a rather predatory step towards you.
Offer to go on a walk with her through the Caverns.
'Is your aphrodisiac addictive? Or anything else dangerous?'
Amy excitedly nods with a happy chirp before smugly lifting her chin as if to lord this fact over you.
Amy then lets out a surprised chirp and vehemently shakes her head no, waving her claws in front of her.

Amy then lets out a shy coo and fidgets with her claws, a very faint blush on her porcelain mask-like face before she opens her mouth with a resounding crack, opening her jaws wide, splitting open her jaw vertically as she reveals her mouth to you again, and points at each of her five tongues.

Getting a closer look now that she's not actively trying to hunt you down, you can see one where a tongue normally would be, two seem to normally lay on the left and right of that tongue, just past her now noticeable, sharp teeth, and the last two seem to retract into her the top of her mouth, all five of which still lead down into her throat.

Then she trails her claw along the inner part of where her jaw splits in two, before trailing it along the long split where her upper mouth and jaw meet normally, showing how far back it goes on her face, then she retracts her tongues and seals her mouth shut with an affirmative chirp as if that explained everything.
You stare at her speculatively for a moment, and Amy fidgets with her claws a moment before slightly splitting her mouth open.
She then promptly shuts her mouth and buries her face in her hands with sheer embarrassment on her mouthless face as she shakes her head in her hands.

Amy quickly calms down from her flustered state, however, and goes down on all fours for a moment, shyly playing with one of her tentacles sprouting from her hair with a claw, maintaining an unblinking gaze with you.
Amy lets out a thoughtful chirp, tapping a claw on her mask-like face as she thinks, glancing over at one of the stone walls, and a long pause ensues.
Then she shakes her head no rather vehemently.

She then purrs seductively while gazing at you, before then letting out a playful chirping giggle, and then gestures to herself and scampers around in a circle and stopping, then lets out a few chirps across from her at the wall, then moving over there to chirp back at herself. Then she shakes her own hand.
So you're here to meet with others like you?
She then rapidly shakes her head with a series of chirps.
You're just here to get to know other monster girls?
She nods with a happy purr. Then she stalks close to you with a sensual purr, and you can already tell her initial seductive purr wasn't exactly a joke even as she leaps away with a giggle.
She lets out a musing purr before lifting her claws together in a grand gesture, waving at the surrounding caverns before slamming her claws together with a resounding clap.
Then she lets out a satisfied chirp as if that explained everything. But she doesn't seem intent on going into any more detail.

EventText.NameOfScene: 'Is your aphrodisiac addictive? Or anything else dangerous?'
theScene: Amy shakes her head no, then leaps at you suddenly, almost tackling you to the ground, one of her tongues slipping out of her mouthless face, as if it's phasing directly through it, and licks your cheek before she hops away with a chirping giggle, retracting her tongue back into her mouth.

You touch your cheek expecting it to be flushing with arousal, but instead find it just coated with normal saliva? You give her a slight glare for her sudden demonstration to show off her ability to apparently not coat you in aphrodisiac.
She seems very amused with your reaction to her sudden physical affection, and sticks her tongue out again slightly, making a slight 'blep' sound before returning it to her mouth.

Amy lets out a happy chirp at your compliment, her stark white face slightly flushing as she gazes into your eyes. She then leans in and quickly nuzzles into your neck for a moment, giving you a sudden display of affection in return before backing away.
You tentatively reach forward and touch her tentacle 'hair' before gingerly petting her, and Amy purrs happily, a few of the tentacles wrap around your fingers and arm as she nuzzles into your palm.

She then uses her tentacles' hold of your hand and arm to keep you patting her a bit longer than you planned, pulling your palm back down when you go to stop, letting out a playful chirp as she does so.

Finally you manage to get your hand back from her and she giggles playfully, standing upright to lick your cheek, one of her tongues seemingly phasing through her mouthless face to give you a little wet affection before retracting into her mouth again, and then she prances back before sitting and waiting to see what you'll do next.

EventText.NameOfScene: Offer to go on a walk with her through the Caverns.
theScene: Amy lets out a happy warble and cheerfully hops in place at your suggestion, seeming to very much like the idea.

Promptly leaping into action, she bounces ahead and signals you to follow her with a beckoning shake of her head, actually requiring you to run after her in order to keep up with her enthusiastic quadruped strides, until she realizes she's getting ahead of herself and simmers down with an apologetic chirrup, slowing down her pace to match yours.

Perhaps concerningly, you don't have much of an idea of where you're going and, truth be told, neither does Amy judging by her carefree expression and accompanying happy hum, but you also can't deny that there's something reassuring about having her by your side... And after all, if she's that nonchalant, that must mean nothing bad is going to happen... right?

You can only hope so as you move from one tunnel to another seemingly at random, sinking ever deeper into the maze-like Caverns in relative silence, the clicking of your companion's claws on the stony floor accompanying the sound of your own footsteps...
You encounter a lone ghost slime.
You find yourself at Nova's hot spring.
You meet a pack of salarisi.
Amy takes you to her toxic matango friend.
You venture into a dark, echoing cave.
You end up on a lumiren's hunting spot.
You encounter a lone ghost slime.
You find yourself at Nova's hot spring.
You meet a pack of salarisi.
Amy takes you to her toxic matango friend.
You venture into a dark, echoing cave.
You end up on a lumiren's hunting spot.

EventText.NameOfScene: You encounter a lone ghost slime.
theScene: Still, even with the two of you progressing side by side, you're not making much noise, which results in your eventual encounter being one that you accidentally catch unawares.

Ahead of you, a ghostly figure is hovering to and fro with her back obliviously turned to you, giggling joyfully to herself as she seems to be thinking aloud, her unchecked inner voice letting you hear her loud and clear as you stand a stone's throw away from her.

Ehehe, who to spook today...?♪ Maybe a salaris? Hmm, but they're a bit too hot-blooded and simple-minded to have some {i}real{/i} fun with... Aaah, if only I could get my hands on an adventurer, I'd scare the pants off them... and then get the drop on them and drain them dry, ehehe...

Even from behind, you can easily imagine the kind of perverted expression the lone monster girl is making, her cheerful tittering turning into lewd chuckling as she seems to get lost in quite the self-aggrandizing erotic scenario.

Meanwhile, Amy has started excitedly wagging her tail with her head close to the ground, her mischievous air unambiguously informing you that she's about to turn the tables on the would-be trickster with a prank of her own... but should you let her?

Curious to see how she'll go about this, you hang back in a shadowed recess, comfortably out of sight as the stark-white huntress slowly creeps forward, her mark ignorant of her approach as she menacingly stands up from her crouching position behind her with a hungry look...
... then taps her on the shoulder with a finger, making her nearly jump out of her ectoplasm in sudden panic.

Swiftly, the phantom turns around to face her sneaky attacker, but even swifter, the eldritch monster girl swoops to the side away from her field of view, leaving her scratching her head when she finds herself staring at nothing, your own presence unseen in your secure hiding spot.

Once more, Amy taps her. Once more, she whirls around. And once more, her stealthy prankster eludes her sight, this time jumping up to the low ceiling and clinging to it with her powerful claws, thus remaining unseen as the ghost sputters and looks around in all directions with a comically dumbfounded expression, which turns into an indignant frown as she does her best to save face in front of whoever is having fun at her expense.
V-Virosa, is that you!? I swear, that better not be an introduction to one of your silly riddles that don't make a lick of...

You can only be impressed at how quiet Amy is remaining as she visibly yet silently chuckles to herself, the predatory woman not making the slightest noise as she stays glued to the stone with lizard-like poise...

However, she seems like she does not want to belabor the point either, cutting to the chase by agilely letting herself drop in front of the obliviously rambling specter, her controlled fall letting her land right before her much like she did back when you and Perpetua first met her, leaving her target gobsmacked as she teasingly lets her tongue slither out and softly taps her on the forehead with it.
After a long second of realization, her reaction is {i}quite{/i} animated, the ectoplasmic monster girl frantically letting out a banshee-like shriek!

{b}Gaaaaaahhh!!!{/b} A-Amy!? I-I swear I'm sorry for pulling that one trick on you last time! A-And for calling you dumber than a salaris! Forgive mee{size=-5}eee{/size}{size=-10}eee{/size}{size=-15}eee!!!{/size}

With extraordinary speed for such a floaty creature, the ghost speeds away, her panicked voice echoing chaotically as it fades into the distance, her departure prompting you to come out of hiding and rejoin Amy who congratulates herself on a job well-done with a warbling giggle, before triumphantly turning to you for your opinion.

She looks glad that you agree, enthusiastically jumping to and fro and prancing around you in celebration for a bit before rubbing against you with a satisfied purr, seeming quite chuffed that you appear to be sharing her notion of what constitutes good entertainment.

With how much of an old hand she obviously is at the stalking game, it makes all the more sense how she was able to give you and Perpetua such a run for your Eros back then, the two of you certainly not being her first victims, and the hapless ghost girl {i}most definitely{/i} not being the last...

The prank's culprit looks away with an expression of guilt at your reproachful response, letting out a sort of plaintive low coo while her tendril-like hair dispiritedly hangs limp, your traveling companion remorsefully shrinking into herself with a whining hum.

You're not sure whether your stern opinion cut {i}that deep{/i} or if she's just deeply reflecting on her actions, but since she seems to be taking your words to heart, you quickly relent and give her a reassuring pat which rouses her from her introspective lamentation, the eldritch woman answering your gesture with a lightly squeezing brush of her hair and a more spirited-sounding chirrup, while still looking pensive.

You stare at the tunnel the ghost girl escaped through, and which still very faintly rings with her fearful cries, Amy following your gaze and nodding with an unconcerned smile, looking quite confident that yes, she'll be alright... Then again, judging by the spectral woman's words, the scare was a form of payback, so you guess she may have had it coming...
Still, your Cavern friend appears somewhat confused at your lukewarm reception, looking questingly at you as if expecting more from you...

... but eventually letting it go and focusing on something else, albeit still seeming a bit self-conscious about the whole thing... Yet, the exact reasons for that reaction of hers are hard to discern, the pale monster girl's inhuman features being as difficult to read as ever.

Stepping forward, you put your arm in front of her to signal her to stop, the primed huntress looking to you with what seems like confusion, but still getting your meaning and relenting without a fuss, standing back and restfully sitting on her haunches to watch her would-be target without being noticed.

The ghost girl in question lingers for a bit with a few more self-absorbed mutters and cackles, but doesn't seem to have anything in particular to do here except fantasize about her next hit, soon moving on in search of a target for her pranking inclinations with a scheming giggle.

And so, without much fanfare, you and Amy find yourselves alone again, the eldritch monster girl coming out of her concealed position and casting you a quizzical stare, as if to ask: 'What was that about?'
... You can't help but feel that you've been a bit of a spoilsport.

Being well aware of how quick your companion can be, you know that if you want to get the jump on her, you'll have to act fast! Accordingly, you pounce forward before you even have the time to fully formulate a plan, your prompt move succeeding in catching her by surprise, leaving her momentarily blinking in staggered confusion!

As for the ghost girl, luck is thankfully on your side, your target seeming too immersed in her reverie to pay much mind to her surroundings, only noticing you and turning to face you when you're but a few sprinting steps away from her!
Time seems to freeze as her features distort in shock, at which point you remember that you have yet to come up with a plan of any kind. What now!?

Calling upon your best impression of a {i}very{/i} disgruntled dragon, you bellow at the top of your lungs while flailing frantically, your frenzied demonstration having the intended effect of throwing the ghost girl in disarray!

Most likely wondering what's up with this crazy charging human and not wanting to stick around and find out, she beats a hasty retreat, swiftly turning her proverbial tail and running away, just casting you a fearful backward glance to make sure you're not following her before disappearing into a nearby tunnel, duly spooked.

Remembering a simple spell you were taught as part of your adventurer curriculum, you quickly call upon a sudden glare of light that radiates from your body, dazzling the ghost girl! In normal circumstances, a simple trick like this would only be enough to momentarily daze your opponent at best, but between the surprise, the low ambient luminosity, and the specter's dislike of light, the effect is as impressive as you were hoping!

In the throes of intense confusion, she zips off... and slams into a wall...
But to her credit, her bouncy, floaty nature allows her to make a swift recovery and turn the incident into a speed boost, rebounding away erratically but at quite the high velocity into the cavernous depths, squealing in panic all the way as she vanishes from sight.

Feeling completely at a loss of what you should do, you go with the first thing that pops into your mind and start frantically rambling while wildly gesturing, spitting out half-baked magic formulas, scientific names of alchemical potions, obscure towns of faraway continents, and botched Venereaean blessings, conjuring a messy flow of unintelligible gibberish.

You feel like a complete doofus as you do so, wondering what possessed you to act in such a fashion and expecting the monster girl before you to burst out laughing... But instead, she goes somehow even paler, fearfully cringing away from your jabbering!?
A-Are you {i}exorcizing{/i} me!? I-I'm too young to go to Heaven! {size=-12}I'm not even a real ghost!{/size}

Definitely looking like she doesn't want to take her chances with you in case you might actually be a bona fide exorcist, the hapless specter turns around and takes off, stopping her ears as she dashes away without daring to look back, fleeing deeper into the Caverns and soon out of your sight in her hurry to get as far away from you as possible.

Turning back towards Amy, you see that she has been diligently observing you, and is now congratulating you on your splendid show with excited waggles of her tail and hearty clapping, crowning your unexpected initiative with success!

Still, the two of you cast a pensive glance in the direction of the fleeing specter who hopefully will be fine after the scare you put her through. Your quadruped companion, for her part, doesn't seem alarmed, hinting that it's {i}probably{/i} alright.

As she sees that you're charging at her with lewd intent, the ghost girl's panicked features shift to an eager smile, your rushing arrival having fortuitously given her just the human she was hoping for. Looks like she won't really be 'spooked' by that much... But no matter!

With your phantasmal opponent defeated, you turn towards Amy, but the monster girl seems more confused than anything, clearly not being very impressed with your scaring methods. Admittedly, there wasn't much 'spooking' involved, and the end result was pretty much just an ordinary fight... but there's not much you can do about that now.
At the worst possible moment, your mind blanks out and you completely falter, your eager sprint fizzling into a stumbling rush as you reach the ghost girl!
Seeing your hesitation, she regains her confidence and grins eagerly at you, clearly all too happy to see a human drop right into her lap!
Heh, not having the chops to go ahead and fuck a cute girl, human? This'll be a piece of cake.♪
At any rate, you no longer have any reason to stick around this now deserted area, and so move on with your exploratory walk...

... which turns out quite uneventful aside from that one notable encounter, ultimately bringing you back to Amy's usual spot... Though actually, you're not even sure that it {i}is{/i} the same place as before, considering how similar the Caverns can look through and through, but you'll have to take her unspoken word for it.
Easing into a restful stance, the pale monster girl turns to you and cocks her head at you with a quirk of her eyebrow, as if to ask: 'What now?'

Perhaps another walk? After all, the Caverns are vast, and it's very likely that you haven't yet seen all there is to see, nor met everyone there is to meet alongside Amy... Though maybe you've had your fill of this place and would rather do something else. After all, you can always come back to it later.

EventText.NameOfScene: You find yourself at Nova's hot spring.
theScene: After a spell of aimless and somewhat monotonous exploration, however, you notice that the air seems to be getting warmer and drier as you go, the normally cool and damp underground increasingly starting to feel downright volcanic... which you know to attribute to the proximity of Nova's lava hot spring, no other area of the Caverns boasting this kind of heat and aridity.

And it appears Amy is aware of this as well, as her behavior noticeably changes, the usually self-assured huntress gradually slowing down and ultimately stopping altogether with an uncomfortable little warble, looking reluctant to progress any further.

Seeing you quizzically turn to her, she looks back at you and nods to the path ahead, then stops and frowns as she visibly ponders how to express herself, eventually settling on setting her hands palms up and lifting them up with a sizzle-like chirrup, then patting her ivory skin emphatically with a wince, before finally looking aside with a shy expression, her demonstration seemingly complete.
'I don't understand what you're trying to say.'

EventText.NameOfScene: 'I don't understand what you're trying to say.'
theScene: The pale monster girl lets out a powerless whine at your confusion, awkwardly fumbling for a bit as she again looks for a way to get her meaning across, then appearing to give up and resign herself to opening her mouth to speak.
She looks away, cringing and hiding her face between her hands, obviously as reluctant as ever to display her difficulty with speaking...
Blinking in slight surprise at your deduction, she nods with an affirmative chirp, looking rather pleased and impressed that you managed to get it in one.
You shrug, and Amy looks a bit miffed that she didn't manage to get through to you, but also and mostly relieved that you're not pressing her on the subject, seeming content to just move on.

With that out of the way, you find yourself faced with the question of what you should do now: proceed, or leave it at that? Either way, you get the clear impression that Amy will go no further, and therefore that even should you venture ahead, you should probably go for no more than a quick visit, lest you just rudely leave her on her own.

You express to your quadruped companion that you're going to go and have a look, which she reacts to with a nod and a reflexive little lick as she settles on her haunches, seeming to have no problem with waiting while you do your thing.
Leaving her behind, you venture deeper into the increasingly hot tunnel, and soon come into view of the underground magma pools...

... then of Nova herself, the elemental woman looking to be taking it easy as always, relaxing in a drowsily lounging posture but soon noticing your presence and treating you to a charming wink in welcome.
Oh hey, hot stuff! What brings you here? Itching for a nice dip? Or did you feel a burning need for my radiant presence?

The curvy lady lets out a giggle at her own wordplay, but then intently listens to you as you explain that you're only here for a moment, having come with a friend that you don't want to leave waiting.

Her curiosity having been visibly piqued, Nova follows up on your explanation by inquiring as to who this 'friend' might be, leading you to describe Amy to the best of your ability... In truth, you find yourself somewhat struggling to meaningfully explain who or {i}what{/i} Amy is, but it appears details won't actually be necessary, as her face soon lights up in recognition.
Oooh, yeah, I know who you mean!

I never got to really meet her, but I heard plenty of rumors through the grapevine. That girl's got quite the incendiary reputation, you know? Kind of a local bogeywoman. 'Amy dwells in the deepest recesses of the Caverns, and makes even the biggest, baddest monsters go weak in the knees.' 'If you're alone in the darkness, Amy will come get you.'... You know how it goes.

But personally, I think she seems pretty {i}ami{/i}cable.♪ Shame that we can't really interact, but I get being too hot to handle, hmhmm... Still, I got to catch glimpses of her, so that trail's not completely cold... Like right now!

As she speaks, Nova looks over your shoulder, and when you turn around, you can indeed see Amy in the distance, somewhat uncomfortably peeking out of a rocky bend as she cautiously stays as far as she can remain while still having you in sight, curiosity or impatience seeming to have won over caution and spurred her to overcome her discomfort in order to accompany you to an extent.

Cheerfully, the elemental raises a hand in salute with her usual breezy nonchalance, treating her to a friendly wave which the porcelain predator returns somewhat self-consciously before apologetically dipping her head and turning back, seeming to have taken as much heat as she can bear, her reaction prompting an equanimous sigh from the lava woman.
Looks like that's it for today as well, hm...
But it's chill, I get it... And I won't be holding you either, [ThePlayerName]. After all, you shouldn't let her cool her heels for too long.
Nodding to her words, you go to take your leave, waving goodbye to the sultry lady who sees you off with a casual bright smile.
Have a good one, and don't be a stranger, hotness...♥ And give her a smooch for me, will you?
The sound of her easygoing giggling follows you as you exit her domain, returning to thankfully fresher parts of the Caverns...

... and to Amy who has gone back to sitting tight and waiting for you, getting up when she sees you emerge back and flicking her tail in idle enthusiasm as she nods away from the present area, seeming to be in something of a hurry to venture somewhere cooler and damper.
Your traveling buddy looks intrigued when you tell her that Nova had something for her...

Then lets out a trilling gasp when you give her a surprise kiss, the eldritch monster girl blushing and chirruping in joy while her tail wags happily behind her, her tendriled hair lightly caressing your face in affection as you draw back.
Bouncing cheerfully, she energetically proceeds with your walk, the simple gift seeming to have put quite the pep in her step as she merrily prances ahead, humming contently to herself.
Having done what you had to do here, you continue your impromptu trip...

EventText.NameOfScene: You meet a pack of salarisi.
theScene: Minute after minute passes without much happening, but after a while, you realize that you've been incidentally venturing into rougher sections of the Caverns where the atmosphere is almost unpleasantly damp, the walls are covered with a wet sheen and moss, and puddles erratically litter your path, the local decor definitely making your surroundings feel... {i}wilder{/i}.

Additionally, you can sense an indistinct but disquietingly familiar pressure in the air that raises your hackles, the sensation hinting at one thing to your adventuring instincts: you're being watched.

And you're clearly not the only one to have caught on, Amy's eyes narrowing in vigilance while her tail flicks alertly, the ivory huntress staring at the darkness ahead as if challenging whoever is out there to show themselves.

The answer to her silent defiance isn't long to come: out of the gloom comes a lone salaris who swaggers forward with predatory smoothness, obviously wanting to make an intimidating display of her entrance as she briefly takes you in, though somehow with little apparent lustful interest for a change, her attention seeming to be instead focused on your traveling companion whom she greets with a snickering, sharp-toothed grin.
Khhehe... About time you showed your pale hide here again. I was itching for payback... We {i}all{/i} were.

On cue, more reptilian monster girls pad into view, the trio giggling, grinning, and licking their lips menacingly, looking confident in their numbers while Amy herself doesn't look too concerned, taking in the posse with a watchful but unworried gaze while the one who is apparently the head of the gang continues to speak.
You may have gotten lucky against me that {i}one{/i} time, but mark my words: that won't happen twice. Not with all three of us here to turn you into a paralyzed, cumming mess!
Yeah, you made a {i}big{/i} mistake coming back here, Amy. We'll put you through so many orgasms you'll forget your own name!

There's a definite feeling that something has gone off script as the third salaris gives you a cheerful wave while the other two choke and sputter and Amy chuckles to herself, the leader of the small pack swiftly snapping in response.
{i}That-{/i} Who cares about the {i}human!?{/i} We're here for Amy, remember?! {b}A-m-y!{/b}
Yeah, get your head in the game!
But... Girls, we don't see a lot of humans around here, and going all the way to their Town is a {i}pain{/i}, so I was thinking...
Hm... You got a point. We could-
No no {b}no{/b}! {i}No distractions!{/i} We agreed that we'd be taking down Amy, and that's what we're going to do!

There's a somewhat uncomfortable pause as the denied salaris glumly looks at the ground in front of her and idly kicks a pebble with a pouty expression, though her comrade quickly cheers her up with a nudge and a confident grin.
Well, don't worry. After we're done with Amy, we can always move on to the human and turn {i}him{/i} into a cumming mess too.♪
Oooh, yeah!... Yeah, that works for me!

With a satisfied giggle, the reptilian woman focuses her attention back on your porcelain friend who has been patiently waiting for your ambushers to sort out their issues, the salaris leader sighing in relief that her entrance hasn't gotten completely off the rails as she again takes the floor.
{i}Good...{/i} And now, with that out of the way...
Get ready, Amy! The only way you're leaving this place is as a fading wreck!

Clearly intent on letting no further distractions stand in the way of its revenge, the gang looks about to pounce while Amy seems prepared to respond in kind to their lewdly aggressive intent, her tail flicking dangerously while her whole body tenses in readiness.

As for you... What should you do?
Make them stand down by showing them you're not scared. (Willpower)
Defeat them with your superior agility. (Technique)

EventText.NameOfScene: Make them stand down by showing them you're not scared. (Willpower)
theScene: As the atmosphere downright thrums with the heavy tension between the four monster girls, you suddenly step between them and squarely stare down your trio of ambushers, your initiative visibly confusing them and even giving pause to Amy behind you who clearly did not see this coming.

Rankled that you're ruining her vibe, the head salaris scowls angrily as she glares back at you with ferocious intensity, her in-your-face attitude demonstrating that she's definitely used to flexing her muscles and showing off her superiority.
Hey, {i}human{/i}... I don't know what's got into you, but me and your girlfriend have something to sort out, so be a good boy and {i}scram{/i}.

She keeps drawing closer as she speaks while straightening up to make herself look taller, saying the last word so close to you that you can actually feel her treacherously sweet paralytic saliva-laced breath over your lips and nose... And yet, you don't move an inch, your stolid lack of reaction causing an awkward pause of several long seconds of more staring until she abruptly loses her cool and kicks it up a notch, roaring in your face.
{size=+5}Yo, are you deaf or something!? I said {b}scram{/b}!{/size}

But even as her powerful bellow echoes down the cavernous tunnels and Amy herself bristles at the confrontational display, you don't even flinch, once more bringing no small amount of confusion to your reptilian aggressor and prompting the other members of her posse to shuffle uncomfortably as one of them volunteers.

Hrm... Y'know, girls, I didn't want to mention it because I know we were in the middle of strutting our stuff and everything, but... isn't it weird that a human's just casually strolling so deep into the Caverns?
O-Oh yeah, I see what you mean... You're saying that he's gotta be, like, {i}strong{/i}, right?

Increasingly thicker doubt hangs over the gang, gradually turning into malaise while Amy looks more and more entertained by this development, the pack leader meanwhile feeling that the situation is slipping from her grasp and attempting to rein things in with a snapping call to order.

D-Don't be dumb! {i}Maybe{/i} he's strong enough to have made it through the Caverns, but even then, it'd still be three-to-one! You'd have to be one stupid human to think you can come out on top against that kind of odds!

Yet, despite her blustering assurance and flat stare at her flunkies, her rousing speech doesn't seem to be having the intended effect, her words in fact sowing more uncertainty in their minds, one of them shyly arguing back after a moment of deep thinking.
A-And isn't it weird that they're just- {i}together{/i}? M-Maybe he's so strong that even {i}Amy{/i} respects him?
O-Or maybe he's, like, some kind of super powerful sorcerer who's mind-controlled her into doing his bidding!?

Their erroneous conclusions working out fine for you, you're all too happy to let them stew in their own delusions and mounting panic while your quadruped companion readily picks up what you put down, docilely ambling closer to you and rubbing against you with a loyal purr, her display of seeming obedience proving to be the last straw for the salaris boss who stares at her for a few long seconds, then eventually gulps and stutters.
{i}Khhhh-{/i} S-Screw this, this isn't worth it. W-Why would I have anything to prove against a girl who became some human's p-pet anyway?

Saving face to the extent she can, she maintains eye contact for as long as she dares while she cautiously backs off, ultimately looking away with a grudging scowl as she and her two friends scurry off, continuing to exchange sore comments and worried speculation until they're out of sight, retreating to the safety of the darkness and its absence of super-powered sorcerers.
